snippet.title: ALPHA | Official Teaser | Alia, Sharvari, Anil, Bobby | Shiv Rawail | YRF Spy Universe | 3 July 2026
snippet.description:
Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge of the seat, thrilling ride that is designed as an out and out entertainer.

Yash Raj Films presents Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol. Produced by Aditya Chopra and directed by Shiv Rawail, acclaimed for the globally celebrated series The Railway Men, Alpha is set to release in theatres worldwide on July 3, 2026.

‚ñ∫ Subscribe Now: https://goo.gl/xs3mrY üîî Stay updated!
‚ñ∫ YRF New Releases: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLCB05E03DA939D484

üé¨ Movie Credits:
Movie: Alpha
Starring: Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, Bobby Deol
Director: Shiv Rawail
Producer: Aditya Chopra
Co-Producer: Akshaye Widhani
Screenplay: Soumil Shukla, Shridhar Raghavan
Director of Photography: Rubais
Music: Rohansh & Abeer 
Lyrics: Kumaar, Anvitaa Dutt, Kausar Munir, Rohansh & Abeer
Dialogues: Ishita Moitra
Story: Uday Chopra
Associate Producer: Rishabh Chopra
Executive Producer: Padam Bhushan
Editor: Aarif Sheikh
Production Designers: Subrata Chakraborty, Amit Ray
Action Directors: Craig Macrae, Sunil Rodrigues (ROD)
Sound: Ganesh Gangadharan, Debasish Mishra
Background Music: Sanchit Balhara, Ankit Balhara
Costume Designers: Aki Narula, Natasha Vohra, Deepali Singh Raseen, Gunpreet Kaur Mann 
Director of Choreography: Vijay Ganguly, Bosco Leslie Martis
Visual Effects Studio: yFX
Casting Director: Shanoo Sharma
Trailers & Promos: Mohit Sajnaney
Release Date: 3rd July 2026

Stay in the filmy loop:
‚ñ∫ Like us on Facebook: Facebook/yrf
‚ñ∫ Follow us on X: x.com/yrf
‚ñ∫ Follow us on Instagram: Instagram/yrf
‚ñ∫ Visit us on: yashrajfilms.com

About YRF Spy Universe:
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinema‚Äôs first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, will release on 3 July 2026.

snippet.title: Welcome To The Jungle - Official Trailer | In Cinemas 26th June
snippet.description:
Film? Bilkul Fake! Danger? Ekdum Real! Survival Skills? Zero!

Tension out, jungle madness in! Welcome To The Jungle where the mission is unpredictable, the madness is nonstop, and the chaos has a wild side!

Watch the #WelcomeToTheJungleTrailer now and get ready for the wildest adventure of the year!

#WelcomeToTheJungle arrives in cinemas on 26th June, 2026 üçø

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Suniel Shetty, Disha Patani, Jacqueline Fernandez, Arshad Warsi, Jackie Shroff, Paresh Rawal, Raveena Tandon, Lara Dutta, Farida Jalal, Johny Lever, Shreyas Talpade, Tusshar Kapoor, Rajpal Yadav, Krushna Abhishek, Kiku Sharda, Daler Mehndi, Aftab Shivdasani, Mukesh Tiwari, Yashpal Sharma, Kiran Kumar, Zakir Hussain, Vindu Dara Singh, Urvashi Rautela, Hemant Pandey, Brijendra Kala, Feroze Khan(Arjun), Late Pankaj Dheer ji, Puneet Issar, Sudesh Berry, Jeetu Verma, Vrihi Kodvara, Adityaa Singgh, Bhagya Bhanushali

snippet.title: SADI SUN - Elvish Yadav & Simrat Kaur Randhawa | Harsh Nussi | Anshul Garg
snippet.description:
Anshul Garg presents Sadi Sun featuring Elvish Yadav & Simrat Kaur Randhawa.

Audio Credits :-
Singer : Harsh Nussi 
Lyrics & Composer : Harsh Nussi x Deep Klair
Music : Harsh Nussi
Guitar : Sachin Sheriya
Engineered by : Hiten
Mix assistant : Jones
Female Model : Heena Mahey
Music Director : Sixthfebb & Kkd45

Associate Director : Rajat Yadav 
Dop : Vikcee
Dop Ac : Rahul
Dop Ac : Rashwinder

Artist costume : Rajat Manchanda

https://www.virginmusic.com/

UPES University (https://www.upes.ac.in/)
Optima Insurance Brokers Private Limited (https://optima.co.in/)

Travel and Hospitality Partner : PRM Hospitality

Lyrics :-
Chup kar lang jaave kol di tu sang jaave
Ikko takkni ch tere rang vich rang jaave
Loki kehnde kithe jaayiye par asi khiche aayie
Kol di jado tu shanka ke saade vang jaave

Duniya di fikar bhula te sahi
Ki sochein saade baare samjha te sahi
Baaki sab tere baare puchi bethe aa 
Dil apne da dass raah te sahi

Akhiyan nal akhiyan mila te sahi
Sadi sun apni suna te sahi
Sade naal dil jeha laa te sahi
Saadi hoja sanu apna bna te sahi x2

Je puchdi aa keho jehe aa,shad de ni eho jehe aa 
Tere hone chaunde aa ni, Paavien asi jeho jehe aa
Dekh azma ke kude, apna bna ke kude
Tere bina hai ni koi, kehnde aa sounh khake kude

Sade naal thoda hass laa te sahi, naagan jyi bann dass laa te sahi
Banja tu raani kude saade dil di, deep deep aakh ke bula te sahi

Akhiyan nal akhiyan mila te sahi
Sadi sun apni suna te sahi
Sade naal dil jeha laa te sahi
Saadi hoja sanu apna bna te sahi

Tenu pouna zidd dil di, mai v vekhda kidda ni mildi
Hor sohniya boht jag te, par tetho ni nigaah meri hildi
Oo kade na kade taa sade taakre, asi bewajah ni tere piche khabre
Billo sachiya preeta pouna chounde aa, aevien khaali feelinga ni kude chakk rahe

Sanu khush jeha rehna tu sikha te sahi
Mukkdi aa gall koi muka te sahi
Baaki diyan gallan aapa fer krange
Pehla ishq paheli samjha te sahi

Akhiyan nal akhiyan mila te sahi
Sadi sun apni suna te sahi
Sade naal dil jeha laa te sahi
Saadi hoja sanu apna bna te sahi

#sadisun #elvishyadav #simrattkaur #harshnussi #harshnussi

Lyrics :-
Chup kar lang jaave kol di tu sang jaave
Ikko takkni ch tere rang vich rang jaave
Loki kehnde kithe jaayiye par asi khiche aayie
Kol di jado tu shanka ke saade vang jaave

Duniya di fikar bhula te sahi
Ki sochein saade baare samjha te sahi
Baaki sab tere baare puchi bethe aa 
Dil apne da dass raah te sahi

Akhiyan nal akhiyan mila te sahi
Sadi sun apni suna te sahi
Sade naal dil jeha laa te sahi
Saadi hoja sanu apna bna te sahi x2

Je puchdi aa keho jehe aa,shad de ni eho jehe aa 
Tere hone chaunde aa ni, Paavien asi jeho jehe aa
Dekh azma ke kude, apna bna ke kude
Tere bina hai ni koi, kehnde aa sounh khake kude

Sade naal thoda hass laa te sahi, naagan jyi bann dass laa te sahi
Banja tu raani kude saade dil di, deep deep aakh ke bula te sahi

Akhiyan nal akhiyan mila te sahi
Sadi sun apni suna te sahi
Sade naal dil jeha laa te sahi
Saadi hoja sanu apna bna te sahi

Tenu pouna zidd dil di, mai v vekhda kidda ni mildi
Hor sohniya boht jag te, par tetho ni nigaah meri hildi
Oo kade na kade taa sade taakre, asi bewajah ni tere piche khabre
Billo sachiya preeta pouna chounde aa, aevien khaali feelinga ni kude chakk rahe

Sanu khush jeha rehna tu sikha te sahi
Mukkdi aa gall koi muka te sahi
Baaki diyan gallan aapa fer krange
Pehla ishq paheli samjha te sahi

Akhiyan nal akhiyan mila te sahi
Sadi sun apni suna te sahi
Sade naal dil jeha laa te sahi
Saadi hoja sanu apna bna te sahi

#sadisun #elvishyadav #simrattkaur #harshnussi #harshnussi

snippet.title: SlumDog - 33 Temple Road Teaser (Telugu) | Puri Jagannadh | Vijay Sethupathi | Tabu | Samyuktha
snippet.description:
SlumDog - 33 Temple Road Teaser (Telugu) on Puri Jagannadh YouTube Channel.

SlumDog - 33 Temple Road is an upcoming gritty pan-India action drama which brings dashing director Puri Jagannadh and versatile actor Makkalselvan Vijay Sethupathi together for one of the most intriguing collaborations. Also co-stars Tabu, Samyuktha, Duniya Vijay and others. Produced by Puri Jagannadh and Charmme Kaur under the Puri Connects banner, in collaboration with JB Narayan Rao Kondrolla's JB Motion Pictures. 

#PuriJagannadh #VijaySethupathi #SlumDog33TempleRoad #Tabu #Samyuktha #DuniyaVijay #CharmmeKaur #PuriConnects #LatestTeluguMovieTeasers #LatestTeluguMovies

The thePJ is a web channel intended to promote cinema through films review, interviews, discussions, video essays and analytical compilations. It is intended primarily for the purpose of encouraging informed discussions, criticism and review of cinema and towards such purpose the programs use short extracts of cinematograph films, sounds recording and photographic works. These clips and extracts are of a minimal nature and the use is not intended to interfere in any manner with their commercial exploitation of the compete work by the owners of the copyright. The use of works are in compliance with the fair dealing exception provided under Sec. 52 of the Copyright Act, and we asset our use of the works under the exception provided for criticism and review.

snippet.title: Bhul Jana ‚Äì Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
snippet.description:
Bhul Jana ‚Äì Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---



Agar mumkin ho‚Ä¶
to hume bhul jana.

Hum tumhari zindagi me
sirf dard bankar aaye the‚Ä¶
aur ab yaadon me bhi
rehna nahi chahte.

Mohabbat sachchi thi meri‚Ä¶
par shayad
tumhare liye nahi thi.

‚ÄúBhul Jana‚Äù
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo toot kar bhi
sirf dusre ki khushi chahta raha.

Is gaane mein
dard bhi hai,
judai bhi,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai ‚Äî

agar sukoon mile‚Ä¶
to hume bhul jana‚Ä¶

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi ko
apni rooh se chaha ho
aur phir use khud se door karna pada ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

üéôÔ∏è Voice: Aarzoo Khaan

en-US.title: What Will Happen to This Universe After Dhurandhar: Alpha Teaser EXPOSED
en-US.description:
üî• ALPHA Teaser Reaction & Review | Alia Bhatt | Sharvari | Anil Kapoor | YRF Spy Universe üî•

In this video, I share my honest reaction and detailed review of the much-awaited ALPHA Teaser starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, and Anil Kapoor from the legendary YRF Spy Universe. üé¨

The teaser looks intense, action-packed, and promises a powerful female-led spy thriller. In this reaction video, we break down the teaser, discuss the action sequences, performances, storyline hints, YRF Spy Universe connections, hidden details, and what fans can expect from the movie.

üí• Is ALPHA going to be the next blockbuster in the YRF Spy Universe? üí• How does Alia Bhatt look as a spy? üí• What role will Sharvari and Anil Kapoor play? üí• Teaser Breakdown, Easter Eggs & Fan Theories!

Watch till the end and share your thoughts in the comments. Don't forget to Like, Share & Subscribe for more reactions, reviews, and entertainment content.

snippet.title: Heart of the Beast | Official Trailer (2026 Movie) - Brad Pitt, J.K. Simmons, Anna Lambe
snippet.description:
It‚Äôs not who you live for‚Ä¶ It‚Äôs who you‚Äôd die for. Watch Brad Pitt in the new trailer for David Ayer‚Äôs #HeartOfTheBeast - only in theatres September 25th. 

After a harrowing plane crash, Special Forces officer James Belmont (Brad Pitt) and his combat dog, Odin, find themselves stranded deep in the Alaskan wilderness. Together, they are forced into a brutal fight for survival against the elements. From acclaimed filmmaker David Ayer, Heart of the Beast is an intense adventure thriller that explores the unbreakable bond between a man and his best friend as they face their greatest battle yet.

Connect with #HeartOfTheBeast
Website: heartofthebeastmovie.com 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/heartofthebeast/?hl=en
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/heartofthebeast
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@heartofthebeastmovie
Threads: https://www.threads.com/@heartofthebeast
X: https://x.com/heartofthebeast

Paramount Pictures Corporation (PPC), a global producer and distributor of filmed entertainment, is a unit of Paramount, a Skydance Corporation (NASDAQ: PSKY), a leading next-generation global media and entertainment company comprised of three business segments: Filmed Entertainment, Direct-to-Consumer, and TV Media. Paramount Pictures has some of the most powerful brands in filmed entertainment, including Paramount Pictures and Paramount Animation. PPC operations also include Paramount Home Entertainment, Paramount Pictures International, Paramount Licensing Inc., and Paramount Studio Group.

snippet.title: Raakh - Official Trailer 2 | Ali Fazal, Sonali Bendre, Aamir Bashir, Rakesh Bedi | Prime Video India
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Raakh Official Trailer 2
Starring Ali Fazal, Sonali Bendre, Aamir Bashir, Akash Makhija, Ramandeep Yadav, Divya Sharma, Vivaan Sharma, Anshul Chauhan, Rakesh Bedi, Dibyendu Bhattacharya
Directed by Prosit Roy, Anusha Nandakumar, Sandeep Saket
Co directors: Anusha & Sandeep
Written by Anusha Nandakumar, Sandeep Saket
Produced by Endemol Shine India BhaDiPa

Official Release Date - June 12, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Raakh is a haunting crime investigation that begins with the disappearance and murder of two teenagers in Delhi. Set in 1978, when such brutality was rare and shocking, the series follows the relentless manhunt launched to track down the killers while exploring the disturbing psyche of the men behind the crime.                                         

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages ‚Äì including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal ‚Äì The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video‚Äôs video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures ‚Äì Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

snippet.title: SPIDER-MAN: Brand New Day - Rebirth Promo (2026) | Marvel Comics | Concept
snippet.description:
#spiderman #brandnewday #marvel

üé• Attention viewers! (ITS FAN MADE)
Get ready for a fresh start in the Marvel Cinematic Universe with the highly anticipated Spider-Man 4: Brand New Day trailer! Following the groundbreaking, emotional events of Spider-Man: No Way Home, Tom Holland returns as Peter Parker in this upcoming 2026 Spider-Man Marvel Studios production. In this brand new Spider-Man movie chapter, Peter navigates an entirely reset status quo straight from the comics, adapting to his "new home" as a street-level hero completely forgotten by the world. Featuring the return of Zendaya and the exciting addition of Sadie Sink to the cast, this Spider-Man: Brand New Day trailer breakdown explores all the major reveals, rumors, and leaks. Experience the web-slinging action in stunning 4K and dive into everything we know so far about the Spider-Man 4 trailer releases across 2026!

The inspiration behind this video:
Get ready for the ultimate web-slinging adventure with the spectacular new spider man movie! The official spider man brand new day trailer is finally here, giving fans their first real look at what's next for Peter Parker after the universe-shattering events of spider man no way home. This breathtaking spider man brand new day teaser trailer showcases the highly anticipated next chapter in spider man 4 brand new day. This massive spider-man marvel studios epic features the triumphant return of Tom Holland as spider man alongside Zendaya, while introducing a thrilling new face to the neighborhood as Sadie Sink joins the star-studded cast. Whether you've been waiting for the official spider man 4 brand new day trailer or breaking down every frame of the spider-man 4 trailer, this definitive spider man 2026 trailer promises to completely change the MCU forever.

As Peter navigates a fresh start in the criminal underworld, rumors of a potential spider man new home subtitle have set the internet ablaze, making this look even more impactful than any concept spider man new home trailer out there. Diving deep into the rich legacy of marvel comics, this upcoming blockbuster is crafted to deliver the high-stakes action fans expect, beautifully presented in crisp 4k. If you have been tracking every major trailer 2025 and trailer 2026 drop, this spectacular journey proves that the web-head is ready to take things to an entirely new level.

We are absolutely thrilled to dive into this new chapter of spider man brand new day alongside the most dedicated movie fanbases and platforms sharing the latest tv promos. A massive shoutout to the amazing communities breaking down this footage, including Rotten Tomatoes TV, Teaser PRO, FilmSpot Trailer, MovieGasm, KinoCheck, EmergencyAwesome, and IGN TV Trailer. Make sure to hit that subscribe button, turn on notifications, and drop a comment with your wildest theories on what's next for Tom Holland and Zendaya!

‚óñMade/Edited By Us‚óó
(Spider-Swings VFX) @NeroDoesStuff 
(SFX, VFX, Art)
‚ñ∫ Art by TeaserCon IG:  /teaserconofficial
‚óñAttention viewers‚óó This Film & Animation video created only for Entertainment. 
Most of VFX created by us.

Thank You So Much For Watching!
Subscribe Now For More.

id.title: SPIDER-MAN: Hari Baru - Promo Kelahiran Kembali (2026) | Marvel Comics | Konsep
id.description:
#spiderman #brandnewday #marvel

üé• Perhatian para penonton! (INI BUATAN PENGGEMAR)
Bersiaplah untuk awal yang baru di Marvel Cinematic Universe dengan trailer Spider-Man 4: Brand New Day yang sangat dinantikan! Setelah peristiwa yang menggemparkan dan emosional di Spider-Man: No Way Home, Tom Holland kembali sebagai Peter Parker dalam produksi Spider-Man Marvel Studios yang akan datang di tahun 2026 ini. Dalam babak film Spider-Man yang baru ini, Peter menavigasi status quo yang sepenuhnya diatur ulang langsung dari komik, beradaptasi dengan "rumah barunya" sebagai pahlawan jalanan yang benar-benar dilupakan oleh dunia. Menampilkan kembalinya Zendaya dan tambahan yang menarik dari Sadie Sink ke dalam jajaran pemain, analisis trailer Spider-Man: Brand New Day ini mengeksplorasi semua pengungkapan utama, rumor, dan kebocoran. Rasakan aksi meluncurkan jaring laba-laba dalam 4K yang menakjubkan dan selami semua yang kita ketahui sejauh ini tentang perilisan trailer Spider-Man 4 di sepanjang tahun 2026!


Inspirasi di balik video ini:
Bersiaplah untuk petualangan meluncurkan jaring yang paling seru dengan film Spider-Man baru yang spektakuler! Trailer resmi Spider-Man Brand New Day akhirnya hadir, memberikan penggemar pandangan nyata pertama tentang apa yang akan terjadi selanjutnya bagi Peter Parker setelah peristiwa yang mengguncang alam semesta di Spider-Man No Way Home. Trailer teaser Spider-Man Brand New Day yang menakjubkan ini menampilkan babak selanjutnya yang sangat dinantikan dalam Spider-Man 4 Brand New Day. Film epik Spider-Man Marvel Studios yang besar ini menampilkan kembalinya Tom Holland sebagai Spider-Man bersama Zendaya, sekaligus memperkenalkan wajah baru yang mendebarkan di lingkungan tersebut saat Sadie Sink bergabung dengan para bintang. Baik Anda telah menunggu trailer resmi Spider-Man 4 Brand New Day atau menganalisis setiap frame dari trailer Spider-Man 4, trailer Spider-Man 2026 yang definitif ini menjanjikan untuk mengubah MCU selamanya.

Saat Peter memulai awal yang baru di dunia kriminal, rumor tentang kemungkinan judul tambahan Spider-Man New Home telah membakar internet, membuat tampilan ini bahkan lebih berdampak daripada trailer konsep Spider-Man New Home lainnya. Menyelami warisan kaya komik Marvel, film blockbuster mendatang ini dirancang untuk menghadirkan aksi menegangkan yang diharapkan para penggemar, disajikan dengan indah dalam resolusi 4K yang jernih. Jika Anda telah mengikuti setiap trailer utama 2025 dan trailer 2026, perjalanan spektakuler ini membuktikan bahwa Spider-Man siap membawa segalanya ke level yang sepenuhnya baru.

Kami sangat senang untuk menyelami babak baru Spider-Man Brand New Day ini bersama basis penggemar film dan platform yang paling berdedikasi yang berbagi promo TV terbaru. Terima kasih banyak kepada komunitas luar biasa yang menganalisis cuplikan ini, termasuk Rotten Tomatoes TV, Teaser PRO, FilmSpot Trailer, MovieGasm, KinoCheck, EmergencyAwesome, dan IGN TV Trailer. Pastikan untuk menekan tombol berlangganan, aktifkan notifikasi, dan tinggalkan komentar dengan teori terliar Anda tentang apa yang akan terjadi selanjutnya untuk Tom Holland dan Zendaya!

it.description:
#spiderman #brandnewday #marvel

Preparatevi a un nuovo inizio nell'Universo Cinematografico Marvel con l'attesissimo trailer di Spider-Man 4: Brand New Day! Dopo gli eventi rivoluzionari ed emozionanti di Spider-Man: No Way Home, Tom Holland torna nei panni di Peter Parker in questa nuova produzione Marvel Studios di Spider-Man in uscita nel 2026. In questo nuovo capitolo cinematografico di Spider-Man, Peter si trova ad affrontare un azzeramento totale dello status quo, proprio come nei fumetti, adattandosi alla sua "nuova casa" come eroe di strada completamente dimenticato dal mondo. Con il ritorno di Zendaya e l'entusiasmante aggiunta di Sadie Sink al cast, questa analisi del trailer di Spider-Man: Brand New Day esplora tutte le principali rivelazioni, indiscrezioni e fughe di notizie. Se avete seguito tutti i principali trailer del 2025 e del 2026, questo spettacolare viaggio dimostra che l'Uomo Ragno √® pronto a raggiungere un livello completamente nuovo.

Siamo assolutamente entusiasti di immergerci in questo nuovo capitolo di Spider-Man: New Day insieme alle fanbase cinematografiche pi√π appassionate e alle piattaforme che condividono le ultime promozioni televisive. de-DE.title: SPIDER-MAN: Brand New Day ‚Äì Rebirth-Promo (2026) | Marvel Comics | Konzept
de-DE.description:
#spiderman #brandnewday #marvel

üé• Achtung, liebe Zuschauer! (FAN-VIDEO)
Macht euch bereit f√ºr einen Neustart im Marvel Cinematic Universe mit dem hei√ü ersehnten Trailer zu Spider-Man 4: Brand New Day! Nach den bahnbrechenden und emotionalen Ereignissen von Spider-Man: No Way Home kehrt Tom Holland als Peter Parker in dieser neuen Spider-Man-Produktion der Marvel Studios aus dem Jahr 2026 zur√ºck. In diesem brandneuen Spider-Man-Filmkapitel muss sich Peter in einer komplett ver√§nderten Welt zurechtfinden, direkt aus den Comics. Er gew√∂hnt sich an sein ‚Äûneues Zuhause‚Äú als Held der Stra√üe, der von der Welt v√∂llig vergessen wurde. Mit der R√ºckkehr von Zendaya und der aufregenden Neubesetzung durch Sadie Sink beleuchtet diese Trailer-Analyse zu Spider-Man: Brand New Day alle wichtigen Enth√ºllungen, Ger√ºchte und Leaks. Erlebt die Netzschwing-Action in atemberaubendem 4K und erfahrt alles, was wir bisher √ºber die Ver√∂ffentlichung des Spider-Man 4-Trailers im Laufe des Jahres 2026 wissen!


Die Inspiration hinter diesem Video: Macht euch bereit f√ºr das ultimative Netzschwing-Abenteuer mit dem spektakul√§ren neuen Spider-Man-Film! Der offizielle Trailer zu Spider-Man: Brand New Day ist endlich da und gibt Fans einen ersten Einblick in Peter Parkers Zukunft nach den weltbewegenden Ereignissen von Spider-Man: No Way Home. Dieser atemberaubende Teaser-Trailer zu Spider-Man: Brand New Day pr√§sentiert das mit Spannung erwartete n√§chste Kapitel in Spider-Man 4: Brand New Day. In diesem gigantischen Spider-Man-Epos der Marvel Studios feiert Tom Holland als Spider-Man an der Seite von Zendaya sein triumphales Comeback und pr√§sentiert mit Sadie Sink ein aufregendes neues Gesicht im Spider-Man-Universum. Egal, ob ihr auf den offiziellen Trailer zu Spider-Man 4: Brand New Day gewartet oder jedes einzelne Bild des Spider-Man 4-Trailers analysiert habt ‚Äì dieser definitive Spider-Man-Trailer von 2026 verspricht, das MCU f√ºr immer zu ver√§ndern.

W√§hrend Peter einen Neuanfang in der kriminellen Unterwelt wagt, kursieren Ger√ºchte √ºber einen m√∂glichen Untertitel f√ºr ‚ÄûSpider-Man: New Home‚Äú im Internet und lassen diesen Trailer noch eindrucksvoller erscheinen als alle bisherigen Konzepttrailer. Dieser kommende Blockbuster taucht tief in die reiche Geschichte der Marvel-Comics ein und bietet die von Fans erwartete, packende Action in gestochen scharfer 4K-Qualit√§t. Wer die Trailer-Ver√∂ffentlichungen von 2025 und 2026 verfolgt hat, wird feststellen, dass der Netzschwinger bereit ist, neue Wege zu gehen.

Wir freuen uns riesig, gemeinsam mit den engagiertesten Film-Fangemeinden und Plattformen, die die neuesten TV-Trailer teilen, in dieses neue Kapitel von Spider-Man: Brand New Day einzutauchen. Ein gro√ües Dankesch√∂n an die gro√üartigen Communities, die dieses Material analysiert haben, darunter Rotten Tomatoes TV, Teaser PRO, FilmSpot Trailer, MovieGasm, KinoCheck, EmergencyAwesome und IGN TV Trailer. snippet.title: THE SOCIAL RECKONING ‚Äì Official Teaser Trailer (HD)
snippet.description:
Every revolution begins with a reckoning.
 
The Social Reckoning, a companion piece to The Social Network, is coming exclusively to theatres October 9.

THE SOCIAL RECKONING
Dramatic Thriller
October 9, 2026

A companion piece to the hit film The Social Network, Sorkin‚Äôs original screenplay is based on the events that gave rise to the Wall Street Journal‚Äôs shocking expos√© The Facebook Files. The film is inspired by the true story of how Frances Haugen (Madison), a young Facebook engineer, enlists the help of Jeff Horwitz (White), a Wall Street Journal reporter, to go on a dangerous journey that ends up blowing the whistle on the social network‚Äôs most guarded secrets. 

Written and Directed by:  
Aaron Sorkin  

Produced by:     
Todd Black, p.g.a.
Peter Rice, p.g.a.
Aaron Sorkin, p.g.a.
Stuart Besser, p.g.a.

Executive Producers:    
Lauren Lohman
Roger McNamee
Ellen Goldsmith-Vein
Broderick Johnson
Andrew A. Kosove

Cast: 
Mikey Madison
Jeremy Allen White
Wunmi Mosaku
Betty Gilpin
Billy Magnussen
with Bill Burr
and Jeremy Strong

Credits not final

This film is not yet rated by The Motion Picture Association. For future rating information, please visit www.filmratings.com.  

#Sony #SonyPictures #Trailer #MovieTrailer #AaronSorkin #MikeyMadison #JeremyAllenWhite #WunmiMosaku #BettyGilpin #BillyMagnussen #BillBurr #JeremyStrong

snippet.title: Bewafa Pyar Ke (From "Aisa Kyon") Sunil Dhawan, Radhika | Udit Narayan, Alka Yagnik | Aisa Kyon
snippet.description:
‚ÄúBewafa Pyar Ke‚Äù from the movie Aisa Kyon is a heartfelt emotional track sung by Udit Narayan and Alka Yagnik. Featuring Sunil Dhawan and Radhika, this song beautifully portrays the pain of betrayal, heartbreak, and unanswered love. 

Credits: 
Singer: Udit Narayan, Alka Yagnik
Music: Ram Laxman
Lyrics: Dev Kohli
Movie: Aisa Kyon
Starring: Sunil Dhawan, Radhika
Director: B.B.Sinha
Producer: Kailash Chand Sharma
Label: Universal Music India

Lyrics: 

Bewafa, pyaar ki raahon mein mujhe chhod diya 

Bewafa, pyaar ki raahon mein mujhe chhod diya 

Kitna nazuk hai mera dil, ise kyun tod diya? 

Kitna nazuk hai mera dil, ise kyun tod diya? 

  

Kya kahoon, mere sanam, gham ne mujhe tod diya 

Kya kahoon, mere sanam, gham ne mujhe tod diya 

Mere halaat ne rishta ghamon se jod diya 

Mere halaat ne rishta ghamon se jod diya 


Haaye, kya khoob mila mujhko mohabbat ka sila 

Kitna berang mere pyaar ka yeh phool khila 

Haaye, kya khoob mila mujhko mohabbat ka sila 

Kitna berang mere pyaar ka yeh phool khila 


Rukh meri zindagi ka kis taraf yeh mod diya? 

Rukh meri zindagi ka kis taraf yeh mod diya? 

Mere halaat ne rishta ghamon se jod diya 

Mere halaat ne rishta ghamon se jod diya 


Beeti baaton ko yaad karke mera dil yeh jale 

Mere sar aankhon pe, jaanam, tere yeh shikwe-gile 

Beeti baaton ko yaad karke mera dil yeh jale 

Mere sar aankhon pe, jaanam, tere yeh shikwe-gile 


Tod ke dil yeh mera kis ke dil ko jod diya? 

Tod ke dil yeh mera kis ke dil ko jod diya? 

Mere halaat ne rishta ghamon se jod diya 

Mere halaat ne rishta ghamon se jod diya 


Bewafa, pyaar ki raahon mein mujhe chhod diya 

Kya kahoon, mere sanam, gham ne mujhe tod diya 

Kitna nazuk hai mera dil, ise kyun tod diya? 

Mere halaat ne rishta ghamon se jod diya


Music video by Udit Narayan, Alka Yagnik performing Bewafa Pyar Ke (From "Aisa Kyon" / Lyric Video).¬© 2026 Universal Music India Pvt. Ltd.

snippet.title: Enola Holmes 3 | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
It will take a Holmes, to save a Holmes. The critically-acclaimed ‚ÄòEnola Holmes‚Äô franchise has returned, taking Enola far from London, where personal and professional dreams collide on a case more tangled and treacherous than any she has faced before. Directed by Philip Barantini (the Emmy Award-winning director of ‚ÄòAdolescence‚Äô), the film stars Millie Bobby Brown, Louis Partridge, Henry Cavill, and Helena Bonham Carter. ENOLA HOLMES 3 premieres JULY 1, only on Netflix.

ENOLA HOLMES 1 and ENOLA HOLMES 2 are NOW PLAYING.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/81605886

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world‚Äôs leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

Enola Holmes 3 | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

Adventure follows detective Enola Holmes to Malta, where her plans to tie the knot unravel when Sherlock's disappearance plunges her into a perilous case.

snippet.description:
The Cinema Show | Episode 1427| June 11

In today‚Äôs episode of The Cinema Show, we'll take a look at how audiences are reacting to the trailer of Akshay Kumar led Welcome to the Jungle. We'll also discuss the buzz around Jailer 2 and the kind of role that Hrithik Roshan is reportedly set to play alongside Rajinikanth. In addition, we'll explore why Alia Bhatt led upcoming film Alpha is facing allegations of plagiarism. Watch The Cinema Show to not miss out on important updates from the World of Cinema.

snippet.title: Whalefall | Official Teaser | In Theaters October 16
snippet.description:
The odds of being swallowed alive by a whale are not zero.

Watch the new teaser for #Whalefall and see the film only in theaters October 16.

Following the death of his father (Josh Brolin), Jay Gardiner (Austin Abrams) goes diving off the central Coast of California in search of his remains, but is swallowed by a massive sperm whale. While trapped inside its belly with only one hour of oxygen left, Jay comes to realize that the hard-earned lessons his father imparted may be the key to his escape.

it.title: Whalefall | Teaser Ufficiale | Al cinema dal 16 ottobre
it.description:
Le probabilit√Ý di essere inghiottiti vivi da una balena non sono pari a zero.

Guarda il nuovo teaser di #Whalefall e non perderti il ‚Äã‚Äãfilm al cinema dal 16 ottobre.

Dopo la morte del padre (Josh Brolin), Jay Gardiner (Austin Abrams) si immerge al largo della costa centrale della California alla ricerca dei suoi resti, ma viene inghiottito da un enorme capodoglio. id.title: Whalefall | Teaser Resmi | Tayang di Bioskop 16 Oktober
id.description:
Peluang ditelan hidup-hidup oleh paus bukanlah nol.

Saksikan teaser baru untuk #Whalefall dan tonton filmnya hanya di bioskop pada 16 Oktober.

Setelah kematian ayahnya (Josh Brolin), Jay Gardiner (Austin Abrams) menyelam di lepas pantai tengah California untuk mencari jenazahnya, tetapi ditelan oleh paus sperma raksasa. Terperangkap di dalam perutnya dengan hanya satu jam oksigen tersisa, Jay menyadari bahwa pelajaran berharga yang diberikan ayahnya mungkin menjadi kunci untuk meloloskannya.

en.title: Whalefall | Official Teaser | In Theaters October 16
en.description:
The odds of being swallowed alive by a whale are not zero.

Watch the new teaser for #Whalefall and see the film only in theaters October 16.

Following the death of his father (Josh Brolin), Jay Gardiner (Austin Abrams) goes diving off the central Coast of California in search of his remains, but is swallowed by a massive sperm whale. While trapped inside its belly with only one hour of oxygen left, Jay comes to realize that the hard-earned lessons his father imparted may be the key to his escape.

Movie: Gabbar Is Back

snippet.title: Naam Hai Tera (Full Song) | Himesh Reshammiya | Aap Kaa Surroor | Deepika Padukone | T-Series
snippet.description:
Presenting the iconic romantic hit "Naam Hai Tera" from the album Aap Kaa Surroor, sung and composed by Himesh Reshammiya. With heartfelt lyrics by Sameer, this timeless track remains one of the most loved songs of the 2000s.

Credits:
Singer: Himesh Reshammiya
Music: Himesh Reshammiya
Lyrics: Sameer
Music Label: T-Series

snippet.title: VALORANT Masters London ‚Äî Swiss Stage ‚Äî Day 5
snippet.description:
From June 6th to June 21st, the world‚Äôs top VALORANT teams will battle at Masters London, the second global event of the 2026 VALORANT Champions Tour. Twelve teams qualified through Stage 1 tournaments of their respective regional leagues, will compete for Championship Points and a chance to advance toward Champions Shanghai.

We‚Äôre proud to work with our fantastic partners throughout 2026: AWS, Coinbase, EWC, ENC, Globant, HyperX, Mastercard, OMEN, Red Bull, Secretlab, and Verizon.

Make sure to follow the official VALORANT Esports social channels for additional information:
Twitter/X: https://x.com/valorantesports
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ValorantEsports/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/valorantesports/
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@valorantesports
Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/valorant
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@ValorantEsports
Photos from the Event: https://www.flickr.com/photos/valorantesports/
Official VALORANT Esports News: https://www.valorantesports.com/news
Web: https://www.valorantesports.com
#VCT #VALORANTMasters

We‚Äôre proud to work with our fantastic partners throughout 2026: AWS, Coinbase, EWC, ENC, Globant, HyperX, Mastercard, OMEN, Red Bull, Secretlab, and Verizon.

Make sure to follow the official VALORANT Esports social channels for additional information:

snippet.title: XIT KODDI (Official Music Video) - Black Sapphire | Alison Gonsalves | Konkani Song 2026
snippet.description:
Xit Koddi ‚Äì An Original Konkani Song by Alison Gonsalves & Black Sapphire
Our staple food deserved a song, so we made one.
An ode to Goa‚Äôs beloved staple meal, Xit Koddi (Goan fish curry rice), and the emotion every Goan connects with, no matter where they are in the world.

From traditional Goan kitchens and paddy fields to friends sharing a simple meal, Xit Koddi reflects the warmth, friendship, unity, and togetherness that have always been part of Goa‚Äôs culture.

‚ñ∂ Watch in 4K for the best experience.

XIT KODDI - Credits
Composer, Lyricist & Singer: Alison Gonsalves
Music Production & Performance: Alison Gonsalves & Black Sapphire
Mix & Master: Revlon Jackson

Project Manager - Fiona Gonsalves

Video Production House - VODDEM Films
Director & Editor - Euban Pereira
Cinematographer - Josephfern D‚ÄôSouza
Co Director & Video Concept - Alison Gonsalves 
Gaffer - Joson Fernandes
Colorist - Rohit Singh
Video Team - Langstan Vas, Ravindr Dias, Fritz Godinho, Valjoe Pinto & Sami Khatib
Wardrobe & Styling - Fiona Gonsalves
Poster & Artwork Design - Raj Vishwakarma
BTS - Langstan Vas & Harish Dharwadkar

Cast:
‚Ä¢ Luisa Fernandes (@thatgoanlady)
‚Ä¢ Gavin Azavedo (Young Boy)
‚Ä¢ Alison Gonsalves
‚Ä¢ Ancy Gonsalves
‚Ä¢ Anthony Bringel (Jr. Chico)
‚Ä¢ Brendon Monteiro
‚Ä¢ Cio Carvalho
‚Ä¢ Jordan Cyrus Fernandes
‚Ä¢ Jackson Fernandes
‚Ä¢ Stanzel Sequeira
‚Ä¢ Harish Dharwadkar
‚Ä¢ Alancia Gonsalves
‚Ä¢ Sandrick Fernandes
‚Ä¢ Fiona Gonsalves
‚Ä¢ Antonio J.N. Gonsalves (AntonJoao)
‚Ä¢ Filomena Gonsalves
‚Ä¢ Langstan Vas

Location Courtesy :
‚Ä¢ Mayvon Mascarenhas (House)
‚Ä¢ Villagers of Quelossim (Fields)
‚Ä¢ Carlton Dias (Office Space)
‚Ä¢ Austrin & Auxilia (Garage)
‚Ä¢ Melvino & Meena (Gilu) - Melsamroy Shop
‚Ä¢ Aleixo Fernandes (Lavista Bar & Restaurant Majorda)

Special Thanks to
‚Ä¢ The Mascarenhas Family
‚Ä¢ Velly Da Silva
‚Ä¢ Alvino Belem
‚Ä¢ Juwel Pereira
‚Ä¢ Josephine Gonsalves
‚Ä¢ Maria Gonsalves
‚Ä¢ James Fernandes
‚Ä¢ Fr. Ramiro Luis
‚Ä¢ Diffa Fernandes
‚Ä¢ Michael Gracias
‚Ä¢ Filomena Gonsalves (St. Cruz)

‚ú® A tribute to the loving memory of my grandmother, Remediana Pereira, whose Xit Koddi filled our childhood with warmth and cherished memories, and to Aleixo Augusto Gonsalves (Haddancho Dotor / Bone Setter, St. Cruz), our biggest supporter and constant source of encouragement.

Forever in our hearts. ‚ô•Ô∏è

üéµ Lyrics ‚Äì Xit Koddi
Verse 1
Ghodyellar vaztoch bara
Asot tu kaamank vo ghara
Bhuken potan godgod zata
Amcho jevnacho vell zala 

Pre ch
Monn amchem lagona
Kaam korunk umedd na
Dollear kallok yeta dista 
Potant jevonn podonastana

Chorus
Sogleanche ruchichi
Amchi Xit Koddi 
Donparam vo ratchi
Amkam zai amchi Xit Koddi

Verse 2
Asot tu kuichea dhorman
Goenkarponn asa amchea rogtann
Soglo sonvsar zogdonn morta
Amchem jevonn amkam ektaita

Pre Chorus & Chorus Repeats

snippet.title: Aye Meri Natkhati College Ki Ladkiyon | Yeh Dil Aashiqana | Karan Nath | Jividha | Udit Narayan
snippet.description:
Song Credits:
Singer(s): Udit Narayan
Music Director: Nadeem - Shravan
Lyricist: Sameer

Movie Cast & Crew:
Producer: Aruna Irani
Director: Kuku Kohli
Cast: Karan Nath, Jividha, Aruna Irani, Aditya Pancholi

Song Lyrics:

Aye Hey
La La La La La Ah Ha
La La La La La La Hey
La La La La La La La 
Laa Laa

Aye Meri Natkhati College Ki Ladkiyon Ladkiyon
Yun Mohabbbat Se Mujhko Na Dekha Karo
Meri Chaahat Meri Arzoo Ke Liye
Apni Masoomiyat Ko Na Ruswa Karo
Hai Meri Natkhati College Ki Ladkiyon Ladkiyon
Yun Mohabbbat Se Mujhko Na Dekha Karo

Jo Fisal Jaaye Main Woh Deewana Nahin
Jo Badal Jaaye Main Woh Zamana Nahin
Waar Jaayenge Khali Yeh Tere Sabhi
Teer Nazron Ka Mujh Pe Na Mara Karo
Aye Meri Natkhati College Ki Ladkiyon Ladkiyon
Yun Mohabbat Se Mujhko Na Dekha Karo

Har Kisi Ko Yeh Dildaar Milta Nahin
Itni Aasaani Se Pyaar Milta Nahin
De Raha Hoon Tumhe Mashwara Kaam Ka
Maine Socha Hai Jo Tum Bhi Socha Karo
Aye Meri Natkhati College Ki Ladkiyon Ladkiyon
Yun Mohabbat Se Mujhko Na Dekha Karo

snippet.title: Tu Cheez Badi Hai Mast Mast | Udit Narayan & Kavita Krishnamurthy | Mohra (1994) | Iconic 90s Song
snippet.description:
Relive the magic of the 90s with "Tu Cheez Badi Hai Mast Mast" from the blockbuster movie Mohra (1994). Featuring Akshay Kumar, Raveena Tandon, Paresh Rawal, and Suniel Shetty, this chartbuster song is sung by Udit Narayan and Kavita Krishnamurthy. With electrifying music by Viju Shah and memorable lyrics by Anand Bakshi, this iconic Bollywood hit remains a favorite among music lovers worldwide.

Song : Tu Cheez Badi Hai Mast Mast 
Movie : Mohra (1994)
Starcast : Akshay Kumar, Raveena Tandon, Paresh Rawal, Suniel Shetty
Singers : Udit Narayan, Kavita Krishnamurthy
Music Director : Viju Shah
Lyricist : Anand Bakshi

Relive the magic of the 90s with "Tu Cheez Badi Hai Mast Mast" from the blockbuster movie Mohra (1994). What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It‚Äôs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community.  Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX ‚Äî interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything ‚Äî be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer ‚ÄúCapture the Flag‚Äù game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (‚ÄúRobux‚Äù). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

They can then explore ROBLOX ‚Äî interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything ‚Äî be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer ‚ÄúCapture the Flag‚Äù game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (‚ÄúRobux‚Äù). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

ROBLOX unik karena hampir semua hal di dalamnya dirancang dan dibangun oleh anggota komunitas. Setiap pemain memulai dengan memilih avatar dan memberinya identitas. Mereka kemudian dapat menjelajahi ROBLOX ‚Äî berinteraksi dengan orang lain melalui obrolan, bermain game, atau berkolaborasi dalam proyek kreatif. Setiap pemain juga diberikan sebidang lahan virtual yang belum dikembangkan beserta kotak peralatan virtual untuk mendesain dan membangun apa pun ‚Äî baik itu gedung pencakar langit yang dapat dijelajahi, helikopter yang berfungsi, mesin pinball raksasa, game "Capture the Flag" multipemain, atau kreasi lain yang belum terbayangkan. Tidak ada biaya untuk lahan virtual pertama ini. Dengan berpartisipasi dan membangun hal-hal keren, anggota ROBLOX dapat memperoleh lencana khusus serta mata uang ROBLOX ("Robux"). Sebagai gantinya, mereka dapat berbelanja di katalog online untuk membeli pakaian dan aksesori avatar serta bahan bangunan premium, komponen interaktif, dan mekanisme yang berfungsi.

Song Credits:
Song: Utha Le Jaoonga
Movie: Yeh Dil Aashiqana (2002)
Singer(s): Kumar Sanu, Anuradha Paudwal
Music Director: Nadeem - Shravan
Lyricist: Sameer

Movie Cast & Crew:
Producer: Aruna Irani
Director: Kuku Kohli
Cast: Karan Nath, Jividha, Aruna Irani & Aditya Pancholi

Lyrics:

Utha le jaaunga tujhe main doli mein

Dekhti reh jaayengi sakhiyan tumhari

Tumko mujhse pyaar hai, pyaar hai pyaar

Tere ghar aaoongi dulhan ban jaaungi

Dekhti reh jaayengi sakhiyan tumhari

Bajegi dholak bajenge taashe meri sagaayi mein
Kabhi to khankegi meri choodi teri kalaayi mein
Sanam hatheli me teri mehandi laga ke baithungi
Teri mohabbat ki shokh bindiya saja ke baithungi
Tera intezar hai, pyaar hai pyaar
